entities.name: SUBMERGENCE
entities.description: An abiotic stress characterized by plants being underwater, leading to yield losses

entities.name: CEREAL CROPS
entities.description: A group of grass crops grown for their edible grains

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: Long-term shifts in temperatures and weather patterns affecting plant growth and development

entities.name: RICE
entities.description: A semi-aquatic cereal crop significantly affected by floods and submergence

entities.name: FLOODS
entities.description: Overflows of water that cause submergence in crops

entities.name: SUBMERGENCE TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to survive and recover from being submerged in water

entities.name: QUIESCENCE APPROACH
entities.description: A biological strategy for submergence tolerance where the plant remains dormant underwater

entities.name: ESCAPE STRATEGY
entities.description: A biological strategy for submergence tolerance involving rapid stem elongation to reach the surface

entities.name: STEM ELONGATION
entities.description: The growth of the plant stem, often as part of an escape strategy during submergence

entities.name: ARCHITECTURE
entities.description: The physical structure and arrangement of plant organs

entities.name: METABOLISM
entities.description: The sum of chemical reactions within the plant

entities.name: SUB1
entities.description: A quantitative trait locus (QTL) that confers submergence tolerance in rice

entities.name: FR13A LANDRACE
entities.description: A specific rice landrace from which the SUB1 QTL was identified

entities.name: PLANT SURVIVAL
entities.description: The capacity of a plant to remain alive under stressful conditions like submergence

entities.name: UNDERWATER SHOOT ELONGATION
entities.description: The growth of shoots while the plant is submerged

entities.name: CHLOROPHYLL LEVEL MAINTENANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to maintain chlorophyll levels during submergence

entities.name: MOLECULAR BREEDING STRATEGIES
entities.description: Techniques used to precisely incorporate desired traits into elite crop cultivars

entities.name: GENOMIC APPROACHES
entities.description: Methods using genome-wide data to identify genomic regions associated with traits

entities.name: GENOME-WIDE ASSOCIATION STUDIES
entities.description: A method to associate specific genetic variants with traits across a population

entities.name: QTL MAPPING
entities.description: A method used to identify the location of quantitative trait loci on a chromosome
